appraisal_events.evidence: Mme Bontemps « entendit dire bientôt que c'était une ineptie »; la chanson de remplacement devient « une vieille rengaine de Massenet, dont la petite nous rebat les oreilles ».
appraisal_events.explanation: Reported salon opinion devalues the songs Albertine sings, first branding one as an ‘ineptie’ and then dismissing the substitute as an old tune overly repeated by ‘la petite’. This locally discredits Albertine by association with unfashionable, overdone music.

status_effects.explanation: Social talk paints her musical practice as annoying and unfashionable, lowering her local esteem.
